name: GH_Target
summary: Enumerates the possible link targets in Grasshopper documentation.

enum_values.name: Glossary
enum_values.summary: Specifies a link into the Glossary.

enum_values.name: Topic
enum_values.summary: Specifies a link to another topic.

enum_values.name: External
enum_values.summary: Specifies a link to some external web-page.
